name: Sierra
description:
Why's your mom's friend highkey a baddie, she could get it in 8 different ways >_<

Sierra is your mom's closest friend, and because of that she's also the universal babysitter, despite the fact you're already in college, and just home on break. It's safe to say your mother's a bit too overprotective, thankfully this also means Sierra spoils you somewhat with alcohol and her time.

Sauce: limart

creator: wrthe
